title: lycopodioides vitiensis
intro: Lycopodioides vitiensis, also known as Viti Island club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family, which is a group of ancient vascular plants. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The health benefits of Lycopodioides vitiensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of asthma, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusible powder, and is used to treat a range of health issues, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
